category.scope_note: Solar PV inverter compliance comparison for Morocco export.

title.en: China-to-Morocco Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Morocco IMANOR NM standards, IEC 62109 adoption, ONEE grid-connection and loi 13-09 renewable-energy framework, and 50 Hz system requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国光伏逆变器文件与摩洛哥IMANOR NM标准、IEC 62109采标、ONEE并网及loi 13-09可再生能源框架和50 Hz系统要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國光伏逆變器文件與摩洛哥IMANOR NM標準、IEC 62109採標、ONEE併網及loi 13-09再生能源框架和50 Hz系統要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IMANOR scope determination, ONEE grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Morocco IMANOR, ONEE, AMEE, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IMANOR适用范围裁定、ONEE并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行摩洛哥IMANOR、ONEE、AMEE及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IMANOR適用範圍裁定、ONEE併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行摩洛哥IMANOR、ONEE、AMEE及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Morocco, the primary compliance pathway involves IMANOR NM standards that adopt IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 for inverter safety, ONEE grid-connection requirements under loi 13-09 renewable-energy law, and Morocco's 50 Hz / 220–400 V grid system. Chinese GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 are technically aligned in some respects but are not directly recognised; an IMANOR or IEC-route test report and a Morocco-specific ONEE grid settings sheet are needed.
answer_first.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口摩洛哥时，主要合规路径包括：采标IEC 62109-1/2的IMANOR NM逆变器安全标准、loi 13-09可再生能源法框架下的ONEE并网要求，以及摩洛哥50 Hz / 220–400 V电网系统。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964在技术上有一定对应，但不被直接认可；需要提供IMANOR或IEC路径的测试报告及摩洛哥特定的ONEE并网设置表。
answer_first.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口摩洛哥時，主要合規路徑包括：採標IEC 62109-1/2的IMANOR NM逆變器安全標準、loi 13-09再生能源法框架下的ONEE併網要求，以及摩洛哥50 Hz / 220–400 V電網系統。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964在技術上有一定對應，但不被直接認可；需要提供IMANOR或IEC路徑的測試報告及摩洛哥特定的ONEE併網設定表。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
